name: Bug report

labels: ["bug", "needs-spec"]
---

## Problem

Describe what is broken.

## Screen / flow

Example: Provider setup → Services page → Gallery upload

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should happen?

## Actual behavior

What happens instead?

## Screenshots / logs

Attach screenshots, console logs, or FlutterFlow errors.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Bug no longer reproduces
- [ ] Loading/empty/error states still work
- [ ] No unrelated UI or database changes
- [ ] Manual test steps added to PR

## Notes for Codex

Keep the fix small. Preserve FlutterFlow generated structure unless required.
